title: dorycnium pentaphyllum subsp. fulgurans
intro: Dorycnium pentaphyllum subsp. fulgurans, also known as lightning-creeping broom or lightning broom, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, due to the presence of alkaloids and saponins. The health benefits of Dorycnium pentaphyllum subsp. fulgurans include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a decoction or tincture, and it can also be dried and used as a tea or added to ointments and creams for topical application.
